title: Distributed Training Setup
interaction_flow: TrainScript → Trainer.__init__(config): construct trainer
Trainer.__init__ → distributed.init(): initialize distributed environment
distributed.init() → pynvml.nvmlInit(): init GPU monitoring
distributed.init() → Device(local_rank): set GPU affinity
distributed.init() → torch.cuda.set_device(local_rank): pin CUDA device
distributed.init() → dist.init_process_group(backend='nccl', init_method='env://', timeout=timedelta): create NCCL process group
distributed.init() → libcudart.cudaDeviceSetLimit(): set L2 fetch granularity
Trainer.__init__ → parallel_state.initialize_model_parallel(pipeline_model_parallel_size, tensor_model_parallel_size, context_parallel_size): Megatron model parallel state
Trainer.__init__ → parallel_state.sequence_parallel = config.model_parallel.sequence_parallel: optional sequence parallelism flag
Trainer.train(model, dataloader_train, dataloader_val) → model.to('cuda'): move model to GPU
Trainer.train → distributed.parallel_model_wrapper(config.trainer.ddp, model): wrap model [if ddp mode]
distributed.parallel_model_wrapper → parallel_state.get_data_parallel_group(with_context_parallel=True): get DDP process group
distributed.parallel_model_wrapper → DistributedDataParallel(model, device_ids=[local_rank], find_unused_parameters, static_graph, broadcast_buffers, process_group=ddp_group): create DDP wrapper
Trainer.train → model_ddp [FSDP path: model_ddp = model, no wrapping]
Trainer.training_step → ddp_sync_grad(model_ddp, enabled=grad_accum_iter==grad_accum_iter-1): context manager to control gradient sync
ddp_sync_grad → model.require_backward_grad_sync = enabled: toggle AllReduce synchronization
Trainer.training_step → model_ddp.training_step(data, iteration): forward pass via DDP redirect
DistributedDataParallel.training_step → self.module.forward = wrapped_training_step: patch forward
DistributedDataParallel.training_step → self(*args, **kwargs): call DDP forward (triggers hooks + AllReduce)
DistributedDataParallel.training_step → self.module.training_step(*args): delegate to real model training_step
Trainer.training_step → grad_scaler.scale(loss).backward(): backward pass + gradient sync (AllReduce via NCCL)
ddp_sync_grad (finally) → model.require_backward_grad_sync = old_value: restore sync state
key_relationships: Trainer depends_on distributed_module (init, parallel_model_wrapper, ddp_sync_grad, barrier)
ddp_sync_grad is a contextmanager that guards DistributedDataParallel.require_backward_grad_sync

key_functions.distributed.init(): Sets LOCAL_RANK, inits NCCL via dist.init_process_group(backend='nccl', env://), sets CUDA device, configures L2 cache. Returns current device.
key_functions.distributed.parallel_model_wrapper(confi: If dist initialized: fetches Megatron DDP group, wraps model in custom DistributedDataParallel with find_unused_parameters/static_graph/broadcast_buffers from config.
key_functions.DistributedDataParallel.training_step(*a: Forward-redirect pattern: patches module.forward → wrapped_training_step, calls self() to trigger DDP hooks, then delegates to module.training_step().
key_functions.ddp_sync_grad(model, enabled): Context manager toggling model.require_backward_grad_sync. No-op if static_graph=True (with warning). Used for gradient accumulation — only syncs on last accumulation step.
key_functions.sync_model_states(model, process_group,: Broadcasts all model params/buffers from src rank (default 0) to all ranks. Verifies shape consistency first. Uses 250MB broadcast buckets.

parallelism_modes.ddp: Wraps model with custom DistributedDataParallel; gradient sync controlled via ddp_sync_grad
parallelism_modes.fsdp: model_ddp = model (bare), no wrapper; on_after_backward and on_before_zero_grad called directly on model

important_notes: Custom DistributedDataParallel uses forward-redirection: training_step patches module.forward to redirect DDP's implicit self() call into module.training_step(), preserving DDP hooks (AllReduce). ddp_sync_grad is incompatible with static_graph=True. sync_model_states is a utility for broadcasting weights from rank0 (e.g., after loading checkpoint only on rank0 to save bandwidth).
